channel.title: Titanium AM Insights on 3D Print Titanium
channel.description: Recent content in Titanium AM Insights on 3D Print Titanium

item.title: HIP vs. Stress Relief for DMLS Titanium: When Each Is Required
item.description: HIP and stress relief are both standard post-processing steps for DMLS titanium, but they address different defects and are not interchangeable. This guide clarifies when each is mandated.
